content.description:
Wrapper that initializes markdown-it with HTML enabled using the global `window.markdownit` function (loaded by [markdown-it](item://08d5ecd2-01a1-43f1-ad50-314027db231a)), and exports the configured instance as an ES module.

## Usage

```javascript
await api.require('markdown-it'); // Must load first to set window.markdownit
const md = await api.require('markdown-it-wrapper');
const html = md.render('# Hello **world**');
```

## Configuration

Initialized with `{ html: true }` to allow raw HTML passthrough in markdown content.
content.code:
const md = window.markdownit({ html: true });
export default md;
